response.original_title: (⭐1-866-216-0631) Can I get my money back from Kraken?
response.overview: {Yes - You Can} Call Kraken support number {⭐+1-((866))-216-0631} requesting refund and get a response within 30 seconds to 2 minutes. It took over 24 hours to get an email {⭐+1-((866))-216-0631} with refund helpful information, and credit can be expected in next 2-3 days. Some get lucky calling Kraken support number {⭐+1-((866))-216-0631} and get a response within 30 seconds to 2 minutes. Whereas for live chat, it remains to be more than 3-5 minutes, that's the reason {⭐+1-((866))-216-0631} customers have much higher expectations for live phone support. Due to incomplete identity and transaction verification ⭐+1-((866))-216-0631 you might not be able to withdraw from Kraken. You can pick any way that you like to update the compliances: [24/7] Phone ⭐+1-((866))-216-0631, Email, Social media, Website contact form, Support ticket with online helpdesk.
